description_long: This doll is designed to resemble a stylized skeleton, with a white body and black painted lines accentuating the ribcage, spine, and facial features. The head is large and round, featuring exaggerated, wide eyes with yellow pupils and a broad, toothy grin. The limbs are short and slightly bent, with the arms hanging loosely at the sides and the legs positioned close together. The back of the doll displays a painted spinal column and shoulder blades, continuing the skeletal motif. The surface appears matte and slightly rough, suggesting a hand-painted or crafted finish. The overall appearance is playful yet eerie, making it suitable as a novelty or decorative item in urban environments.
description: A white, hand-painted skeleton-themed doll with black detailing, a large grinning face, and exaggerated anatomical features.
description_view_0: Front view shows the doll's wide, grinning face, yellow eyes, and detailed ribcage and abdomen.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, protruding jaw, and the curvature of the limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the painted spine, shoulder blades, and the back of the head, with minimal facial detail visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the face and body contours.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is unclothed, with its body painted to resemble a skeleton, featuring black lines and details on a white surface to mimic bones and anatomical features.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with its head facing forward, arms relaxed and slightly bent at the sides, and legs straight and close together.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a wide, toothy grin, round open eyes with yellow pupils, and arched black lines above the eyes, giving it a playful and slightly mischievous expression.
attribute_hair_style: No visible hair; the head is smooth and painted white with black skeletal markings.
